creator: jwb@freebsd.org
text:
Hello Andy,

Hope this email is still valid.

Can you send a reply to bug-followup@freebsd.org?

Thanks,

     -J

On 04/07/12 16:28, Chris Rees wrote:
> Jason,
>
> If you can get the maintainer to send an email saying that he's no
> longer interested, with Subject Re: ports/166733 to

> approved.
>
> Cheers!
>
> Chris
